data.title: Write RED tests for REBASE_HEAD detection in pre-commit-test-gate.sh
data.description:
## Description

Add 4 new test functions to tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh mirroring the existing MERGE_HEAD test pattern (tests 32-36):

1. test_gate_rebase_filters_incoming_only_files: Create a git repo (using mktemp -d with trap cleanup) with divergent history. Set up REBASE_HEAD state by creating .git/rebase-merge/onto with the onto ref and .git/REBASE_HEAD with a dummy sha. Stage files that are incoming-only (changed only on the rebase target). Verify the hook exits 0 (gate passes for incoming-only files).

2. test_gate_rebase_keeps_worktree_branch_files: Same setup (own mktemp -d) but include a file modified by BOTH the worktree branch and the rebase target. Verify the hook exits non-zero (gate enforces for files the worktree also changed).

3. test_gate_rebase_failsafe_on_missing_onto: Create REBASE_HEAD state (own mktemp -d) but omit the onto file entirely. Verify the hook falls through to normal enforcement (exit non-zero for untested staged files).

4. test_gate_rebase_prune_skipped_during_rebase: Create a repo with .test-index and a REBASE_HEAD file (own mktemp -d). Verify prune_test_index is skipped when REBASE_HEAD is present (mirroring test 26 for MERGE_HEAD).

IMPORTANT: Each test function MUST create its repo in a unique $(mktemp -d) and use trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT for cleanup. Tests must not share git repo fixtures or leave REBASE_HEAD artifacts.

Register the tests with run_test at the end of the test file, following the existing pattern.

## TDD Requirement

All 4 tests will FAIL (RED) because pre-commit-test-gate.sh has no REBASE_HEAD handling. The tests execute the hook in a simulated rebase state and assert on exit codes — behavioral tests, not structural grep checks.

## File Impact

- tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh (modify — add 4 test functions)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker for new tests)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — RED tests tolerated via .test-index marker
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] Test file contains at least 4 new test functions for REBASE_HEAD
  Verify: grep -c "test_gate_rebase" tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Each test creates a real git repo and simulates REBASE_HEAD state
  Verify: grep -c "REBASE_HEAD" tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry updated with RED marker for the new tests
  Verify: grep -q 'pre-commit-test-gate.*test_gate_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
